content: Iodized salt was introduced in the early 1900s to address iodine deficiency.
Iodized salt is unopposed sodium, lacking essential minerals like potassium, magnesium, and phosphorus.
Unopposed sodium causes an imbalance in the body, leading to water retention and negative health effects.
Pink Himalayan salt contains a super wide profile of minerals including manganese, magnesium, potassium, and iodine.
Pink Himalayan salt is overmined and imported from limited resources, making it inefficient.
Truffle salt is sea salt with tiny pieces of truffles, providing a high mineral profile and amunom modulators.
Truffle salt balances sodium intake, reduces water retention, and helps reduce inflammation and boost the immune system.
